summary: This document is an Instructions for Use (IFU) guide for the KeepMeCompany AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform. It outlines the patient workflow for booking appointments via voice interaction, including identity verification and data transmission protocols. The text also includes critical safety disclaimers regarding emergency use and data protection compliance.
